name: Consulting Intelligence Agent
description: Generates structured consulting meeting prep briefs for enterprise clients. Researches industry trends, competitive landscape, and technology developments. Returns a formatted brief with talking points, risk factors, and recommended questions.

skills.name: Meeting Prep Brief
skills.description: Generates a comprehensive consulting meeting prep brief for a given topic and optional client name. Includes industry context, competitive landscape, technology trends, talking points, and recommended questions. Takes 60-90 seconds for thorough research.

examples.input: Prepare a brief on AI adoption in healthcare for our meeting with UnitedHealth Group
examples.output: A structured brief covering AI trends in healthcare, UnitedHealth's current AI initiatives, competitive landscape, talking points, and 5 recommended questions for the meeting.

skills.name: Competitive Analysis
skills.description: Analyzes the competitive landscape for a given market or technology area. Returns key players, positioning, strengths/weaknesses, and strategic implications.

skills.name: Technology Evaluation
skills.description: Evaluates a technology for enterprise adoption. Covers maturity, use cases, vendors, risks, and implementation considerations.
